entry.title: IDC 70T04018D9CAP1035 (P00010) awarded to SMITHS DETECTION INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: EXTENSION OF THE ORDERING PERIOD THROUGH APRIL 30, 2025.

entry.title: IDC 70T04018D9CAP1035 (P00011) awarded to SMITHS DETECTION INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO IMPLEMENT NECESSARY CHANGES AS A RESULT OF THE RECISSION OF EXECUTIVE ORDER (E.O.) 11246, E.O. 14168 (90 FR 8615), AND E.O. 14173 (90 FR 863).

entry.title: IDC 70T04018D9CAP1035 (P00012) awarded to SMITHS DETECTION INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF MODIFICATION P00012 TO CONTRACT 70T04018D9CAP1035 IS TO EXTEND THE PERIOD OF PERFORMANCE FOR THREE MONTHS AT NO COST TO THE GOVERNMENT. THE ACTION FALLS WITHIN SECTION 2(D) AS A NON-COVERED CONTRACT IN ACCORDANCE WITH EXECUTIVE ORDER 14222. THIS CONTRACT ALIGNS WITH ONE OF THE DESIGNATED CATEGORY: PUBLIC SAFETY.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: MISCELLANEOUS ALARM, SIGNAL, AND SECURITY DETECTION SYSTEMS

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:manufacturingOrganizationType.description: FOREIGN-OWNED BUSINESS NOT INCORPORATED IN THE U.S.

entry.title: IDC 70T04018D9CAP1035 (P00013) awarded to SMITHS DETECTION INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO REVISE THE ORDERING PERIOD END DATE FROM JULY 30, 2025 TO AUGUST 31, 2025.

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO REVISE THE ORDERING PERIOD END DATE FROM AUGUST 31, 2025 TO OCTOBER 15, 2025.
